items.content_html:

## UVic alumnus Simon Keith celebrates 40 years with donor heart Published 4:45 pm Wednesday, July 8, 2026 **By Tony Trozzo** Simon Keith, a graduate of Mount Douglas High School and the University of Victoria, was the first professional athlete to compete with a transplanted heart. (Tony Trozzo/Victoria News file photo) Simon Keith, a graduate of Mount Douglas High School and the University of Victoria, was the first professional athlete to compete with a transplanted heart. 🎨 🌾 🏔️ ✏️

“The question I would have is, why are you joining a sinking ship?” said Findlay as she commented on Boultbee’s move. “All the polls show the NDP has lost ground, say that British Columbians don’t have faith in them continuing.
